title: Bringing Grandpa Home from the Hospital

all.en: After two weeks in the hospital, Grandpa was finally allowed to come home with us on Sunday afternoon.
all.zh: 在醫院待了兩個星期後，爺爺終於在星期天下午獲准跟我們回家。

all.en: Mom had spent the whole morning rearranging the living room to make space for his walker.
all.zh: 媽媽花了整個早上重新安排客廳，好騰出空間給他的助行器。

all.en: I borrowed a wheelchair from the community health center so Dad could push Grandpa from the car.
all.zh: 我從社區衛生所借了一台輪椅，這樣爸爸就能把爺爺從車上推進來。

all.en: When the front door opened, Grandpa smiled weakly and said the house smelled exactly like home.
all.zh: 當前門打開時，爺爺虛弱地笑了，說家裡聞起來就和記憶中一模一樣。

all.en: His bedroom had been moved to the first floor because climbing stairs was no longer safe for him.
all.zh: 他的臥室已經搬到一樓，因為爬樓梯對他來說已經不再安全。

all.en: On the bedside table, I had placed his reading glasses, a water bottle, and his favorite old radio.
all.zh: 在床頭櫃上，我擺了他的老花眼鏡、一個水瓶，還有他最愛的舊收音機。

all.en: The doctor had given us a long list of medications and a strict schedule for taking them.
all.zh: 醫生給了我們一長串藥物清單，還有嚴格的服藥時間表。

all.en: Mom printed the schedule in large letters and stuck it on the refrigerator with a yellow magnet.
all.zh: 媽媽把那張表格用大字體印出來，再用一個黃色磁鐵貼在冰箱上。

all.en: My little sister was assigned the job of reminding Grandpa to drink water every two hours.
all.zh: 妹妹被分配的工作是每兩個小時提醒爺爺喝一次水。

all.en: She took the task very seriously and even set alarms on her pink wristwatch.
all.zh: 她把這份任務看得非常認真，甚至在她粉紅色的手錶上設了鬧鐘。

all.en: I was in charge of helping Grandpa with his physical therapy exercises after dinner each night.
all.zh: 我則負責每天晚飯後協助爺爺做復健運動。

all.en: At first he struggled to lift his right arm above his shoulder without wincing in pain.
all.zh: 一開始他連把右臂抬到肩膀以上都很吃力，總是痛得皺眉。

all.en: We started with five small repetitions and slowly worked our way up to fifteen over the week.
all.zh: 我們從五個小動作開始，一個星期下來慢慢進步到十五下。

all.en: Grandpa hated being treated like a child and sometimes refused his medication out of stubbornness.
all.zh: 爺爺討厭被當小孩看待，有時還會因為固執而拒絕吃藥。

all.en: Mom learned to mix his pills into a spoonful of warm honey to make them easier to swallow.
all.zh: 媽媽學會把藥丸混在一匙溫蜂蜜裡，讓他比較容易吞下去。

all.en: Dad took two weeks off from his factory job to handle the night shift of caregiving.
all.zh: 爸爸從工廠請了兩週假，負責夜間的看護工作。

all.en: He often fell asleep on the small couch beside Grandpa's bed while watching old baseball games.
all.zh: 他常常一邊看著舊棒球比賽，一邊在爺爺床邊的小沙發上睡著。

all.en: One rainy night, Grandpa called me into his room and asked me to find a wooden box.
all.zh: 某個雨夜，爺爺把我叫進房間，請我找出一個木盒。

all.en: Inside the box were letters my grandmother had written to him before they got married.
all.zh: 盒子裡是奶奶在他們結婚之前寫給他的信。

all.en: He asked me to read one aloud because his eyes were too tired to see the small handwriting.
all.zh: 他請我大聲念其中一封，因為他的眼睛太累了，看不清楚那細小的字跡。

all.en: By the third sentence, both of us had tears running down our cheeks without any shame.
all.zh: 念到第三句時，我們兩個人的眼淚都毫不掩飾地流了下來。

all.en: From that night on, I read him one letter every evening before he went to sleep.
all.zh: 從那天晚上起，我每天睡前都念一封信給他聽。

all.en: His appetite slowly returned, and Mom started cooking his favorite radish soup three times a week.
all.zh: 他的胃口慢慢恢復，媽媽開始一週煮三次他最愛的蘿蔔湯。

all.en: Our neighbor Mrs. Wu dropped by often, bringing homemade rice cakes and gossip from the market.
all.zh: 鄰居吳太太常常順道過來，帶來自家做的米糕和市場的八卦。

all.en: Grandpa especially enjoyed her stories because she had known my late grandmother for forty years.
all.zh: 爺爺特別愛聽她的故事，因為她認識我過世的奶奶已經有四十年了。

all.en: After three weeks at home, Grandpa could walk to the kitchen by himself without the walker.
all.zh: 在家休養三週後，爺爺已經可以自己走到廚房，不需要助行器。

all.en: The whole family clapped when he poured his own cup of tea for the first time.
all.zh: 當他第一次自己倒了一杯茶時，全家人都為他鼓掌。

all.en: On the day of his follow-up appointment, the doctor was surprised by how quickly he had recovered.
all.zh: 回診那天，醫生對他恢復得這麼快感到非常驚訝。

all.en: Grandpa proudly told her that family love was the only medicine that truly worked on him.
all.zh: 爺爺驕傲地告訴她，家人的愛才是真正對他有用的藥。

all.en: On Sunday, we took him for a short walk around the small park near our house.
all.zh: 星期天，我們帶他到家附近的小公園散步一小段路。

all.en: He stopped at the goldfish pond and stood there quietly for almost ten full minutes.
all.zh: 他在金魚池邊停了下來，靜靜地站了將近整整十分鐘。

all.en: He said your grandmother and I came here on our very first date in 1968.
all.zh: 他說你奶奶和我在一九六八年的第一次約會就是來這裡。

all.en: That evening, my sister helped him write a new letter to put inside the old wooden box.
all.zh: 那天晚上，妹妹幫他寫了一封新的信，放進那個老舊的木盒裡。

all.en: The letter was addressed to all his grandchildren, thanking us for bringing him home again.
all.zh: 那封信是寫給所有孫子孫女的，感謝我們再一次把他帶回了家。

all.en: I sealed it carefully and promised myself I would not open it until many years from now.
all.zh: 我小心地把信封好，並答應自己很多年以後才會打開它。

all.en: As autumn turned into early winter, Grandpa began teaching me how to play traditional chess.
all.zh: 秋天轉入初冬時，爺爺開始教我下傳統象棋。

all.en: We set up the wooden board on the dining table every afternoon for at least one game.
all.zh: 我們每天下午都在餐桌上擺好木製棋盤，至少下一盤棋。

all.en: He told me old stories about each piece, mixing rules of the game with family history.
all.zh: 他講述每顆棋子背後的老故事，把棋規與家族歷史交織在一起。

all.en: My sister learned to record his anecdotes on her phone so we would never lose them.
all.zh: 妹妹學會用手機錄下他的軼事，這樣我們就永遠不會遺忘。

all.en: Mom transcribed those audio clips into a thick notebook bound in soft brown leather.
all.zh: 媽媽把那些音檔謄寫進一本厚厚的、軟棕色皮革裝訂的筆記本裡。

all.en: Dad returned to work, but he came home early every Friday for a long family dinner.
all.zh: 爸爸回去上班了，但每個星期五都早早回家共進一頓漫長的家庭晚餐。

all.en: By December, Grandpa could climb a few stairs again, holding the rail with steady patience.
all.zh: 到了十二月，爺爺又能爬幾階樓梯了，他穩穩耐心地扶著欄杆。

all.en: On his eightieth birthday, the whole family gathered with a small cake and many candles.
all.zh: 在他八十歲生日那天，全家圍著一個小蛋糕和許多蠟燭聚在一起。

all.en: He blew out the flames in one steady breath and asked for one more year of stories.
all.zh: 他穩穩地一口氣吹熄火焰，許願再多一年來說故事。

all.en: I hugged him tightly and realized that bringing him home was the best decision we ever made.
all.zh: 我緊緊抱住他，明白把他帶回家是我們做過最棒的決定。

all.en: After his birthday, Grandpa began writing his memoirs in a thick green notebook every afternoon.
all.zh: 生日過後，爺爺每天下午都在一本厚厚的綠色筆記本裡寫他的回憶錄。

all.en: He filled the pages with stories of his childhood village before the long highway was built.
all.zh: 他在書頁裡寫滿了童年村莊在長長公路興建之前的故事。

all.en: Mom suggested we type up each chapter and bind the memoir into a small family book.
all.zh: 媽媽建議我們把每個章節打成電子檔，然後裝訂成一本小型家族紀念書。

all.en: I scanned old black-and-white photos to use as illustrations between the chapters of the manuscript.
all.zh: 我把舊的黑白照片掃描下來，當作書稿章節之間的插圖。

all.en: On Lunar New Year, we presented Grandpa with the first printed copy bound in soft red cloth.
all.zh: 農曆新年時，我們把第一本紅色軟布裝幀的印刷成書送給爺爺。

all.en: Tears welled in his eyes as he traced his own name embossed gently on the cover.
all.zh: 當他用手指輕觸封面上燙印的自己名字時，眼眶湧出淚水。

all.en: He signed copies for every grandchild and asked us to read at least one chapter aloud each month.
all.zh: 他為每個孫子孫女簽名，並要我們每個月至少朗讀其中一個章節。

all.en: My sister recorded an audiobook version on her phone using his slow, warm voice from old recordings.
all.zh: 妹妹用她的手機錄製了有聲書版本，採用他舊錄音中那緩慢溫暖的嗓音。

all.en: Distant relatives from the south requested copies and wept reading stories they had never heard before.
all.zh: 南部遠房親戚要求要書，他們讀著從未聽過的故事而落淚。

all.en: Grandpa smiled and said his life had finally found a way to keep speaking even when he could not.
all.zh: 爺爺微笑著說，他的人生終於找到一種方式，即使他無法再說話，也能繼續訴說。
